task_description: Generate embeddings and perform semantic similarity search
validation_rules: Must create embeddings table with review_id, review_text, embedding_vector
Must use VECTOR_COSINE_SIMILARITY(vec1, vec2) for comparison
Must find top 3 similar reviews (exclude review comparing to itself)
Similarity scores must be in 0.0-1.0 range
Must implement semantic search for arbitrary text query
Results must show meaningful similarity patterns

semantic_expectations.positive_reviews: Should have high similarity to each other (>0.7)
semantic_expectations.negative_reviews: Should have low similarity to positive (0.2-0.4)
